description: insights library for Wukong Finance | load active patterns before each analysis

patterns.name: Geopolitical event + supply gap = high win-rate window
patterns.boundaries: Reverse within 1-3 days if ceasefire; max hold 3 days
patterns.key_signal: Supply gap cannot be filled short-term (e.g. Hormuz = 20% oil transit)
trading_rules: Window 1-3 days, must enter/exit quickly
Must set logical stop: ceasefire/peace_declaration/Hormuz_reopen -> exit immediately
Reduce geopolitical exposure before holidays (cannot update priors during closure)

patterns.name: Foreign markets lead A-shares by 1-2 days
patterns.formula: Pre-holiday -> check Nasdaq futures/BTC/Nikkei -> predict A-share direction next day
patterns.scope: All A-shares post-holiday opens, especially Qingming/May Day/National Day
patterns.boundaries: Lunar New Year/National Day strongest effect; small holidays ~1 day effect
patterns.key_signal: Foreign markets direction on last trading day before holiday
trading_rules: Must check foreign markets 1 day before holiday: Nasdaq futures, BTC, Nikkei
Foreign up -> A-share gap up probability >70%
Foreign down -> A-share gap down probability >70%

history.judgment: US tech up premarket -> A-share follows

patterns.name: Earnings validation + earnings season = highest win-rate
patterns.scope: All sectors, strongest in tech/medicine/new energy
patterns.boundaries: Even earnings stocks drop in systemic bear market
patterns.key_signal: Earnings beat + industry leader + quarterly report window
trading_rules: In earnings season, prioritize earnings validation logic over theme trading
Earnings beat + next day gap up -> safe to enter (institutions validated)
2 consecutive quarters of beats -> trend opportunity

history.judgment: TCL net profit +150% -> panel cycle inflection
Innovative drug BD outbound -> pharma limit up
Xiaomi auto deliveries >10K -> new energy active

patterns.name: Trump Jawboning Reversal Law
patterns.scope: Gold, crude, crypto, A-share safe-haven assets
patterns.boundaries: The harder Trump pushes, the more it signals the asset is losing momentum
patterns.key_signal: Trump repeatedly喊话same asset for multiple days
trading_rules: 1x喊话: ignore, follow original trend (reversal ~30%)
2-3x喊话: be cautious, reduce position, do not chase (reversal ~50%)
3x+ with actual action: clear reversal signal, reverse (reversal >=70%)

history.judgment: Trump repeated Iran threats -> gold peaks at 4800 then drops
Trump repeated dollar strength complaints -> DXY drops

patterns.name: Trump China hawkish -> semiconductor/AI chip self-sufficient main theme
patterns.formula: Trump hawkish on China/tech sanctions + chip/AI sector = long window
patterns.scope: Semiconductor equipment, AI chips, domestic software, storage
patterns.boundaries: If simultaneous geopolitical escalation, gold/oil splits funds; Trump softens =失效
patterns.key_signal: Trump announces new China tech sanctions/tariffs
trading_rules: Trump chip ban/tariffs -> domestic替代 logic strengthened -> long chip/AI
Can combine with GEO-001: Trump hawkish + geopolitical escalation = chip+gold dual theme
Trump softens or deal progress -> exit self-sufficient positions immediately

history.judgment: Trump tariffs -> AI chip self-sufficient rally
Huawei entity list escalation -> domestic替代 surge

patterns.name: Trump trade + geopolitical hedge = dual main themes (stackable)
patterns.formula: Trump hawkish(tech_long) + geopolitical escalation(bullion_long) = chip+gold dual
patterns.scope: When Trump is simultaneously hawkish on China AND some region geopolitical escalation
patterns.boundaries: When geopolitical eases, Trump logic runs independently; tech continues
patterns.key_signal: Trump hawkish on China + any regional geopolitical escalation
trading_rules: Dual theme simultaneously -> split allocation: chip 50% + gold 50%
Geopolitical eases (ceasefire) -> exit gold, keep Trump logic (tech)
Trump softens -> exit tech, keep geopolitical logic (if any)

history.judgment: Trump Iran threats + Middle East crisis -> chip+gold dual themes

patterns.name: Bayesian prior must update in real-time
patterns.boundaries: Geopolitical priors extremely unstable, must enter/exit quickly
patterns.key_signal: Key variables = price triggers NOT holding reasons
trading_rules: Geopolitical priors need update every 6-12 hours
Key variables = triggers: ceasefire_reached -> auto exit
Do NOT use key variables as HOLD reasons, only as STOP conditions

history.judgment: Predict oil/gas win rate 72% (based on Hormuz persistence)
history.note: Root cause: prior not updated during holiday closure

failure_lessons: Prior cannot update during holiday -> 04-05 failure root cause

patterns.name: Geopolitical linear extrapolation fallacy
patterns.formula: Rhetoric escalation != actual escalation; mutual强硬 = negotiations imminent signal
patterns.boundaries: True escalation signal = both sides start military action, not rhetoric
patterns.key_signal: News shows mutual强硬 statements from both sides
trading_rules: Seeing mutual rhetoric escalation -> do NOT chase safe-haven assets, wait for actual military action
True escalation signal: both sides start military action/weapons deployment
Rhetoric escalation is actually a signal of imminent negotiations (game theory commitment problem)

history.judgment: Iran强硬rejects -> situation will inevitably escalate

failure_lessons: Linear extrapolation is biggest enemy in geopolitical judgment
Maximum pressure is a negotiating tactic, not an end goal

patterns.name: ETF code/name mapping — must verify before citing (v2.0)
patterns.formula: News theme -> check etf_map.json -> use verified code
patterns.scope: All A-share ETF references in financial news analysis
patterns.boundaries: Always use etf_map.json when ANY news mentions ETF code or theme
trading_rules: 512880 = 证券ETF（券商/中信证券）≠ 银行ETF(512800) ≠ 国债ETF(无) ≠ 酒ETF(512690)
512800 = 银行ETF（工行/招行/六大行/净息差）≠ 金融ETF
512690 = 酒ETF（白酒/茅台/五粮液）≠ 能源ETF
512900 = 证券ETF（券商/中信证券）— 新闻提到券商/证券就用512900
561360 = 石油ETF（原油/能源）
515220 = 煤炭ETF（非电力）≠ 电力ETF
561700 = 电力ETF博时
159320 = 电网ETF（特高压/变压器/十五五/硅钢）
159755 = 电池ETF（钠锂混合/宁德时代/储能/动力电池）
516070 = 易方达新能源ETF（光伏+锂电+智能汽车）≠ 516160新能源ETF
512480 = 半导体ETF（芯片设备/半导体材料）
512760 = 芯片ETF（AI芯片/存储/美光/铠侠）≠ 512480半导体ETF
588200 = 科创芯片ETF
515070 = 人工智能AIETF
512930 = AI人工智能ETF（算力）
159819 = 人工智能ETF易方达
515980 = 人工智能ETF（云计算/大数据/SpaceX/字节）
518880 = 黄金ETF（避险/地缘/金价）
159985 = 豆粕ETF（农产品/期货/农业）
561360 = 石油ETF
515220 = 煤炭ETF（≠电力ETF）
When news says 银行+券商+保险: use 512800银行ETF + 512900证券ETF + 512070保险ETF separately
NEVER infer ETF code from news thematic keywords alone — always cross-reference etf_map.json first
NEVER write '银行ETF' without confirming code: bank=512800, liquor=512690, securities=512880
failure_lessons: Root cause: 512880 wrong = 证券ETF was mistakenly called 国债ETF/银行ETF because of thematic confusion
Root cause: 512690 wrong = 酒ETF was mistakenly called 金融ETF/能源ETF
Root cause: 515220 wrong = 煤炭ETF was called 电力ETF
Root cause: 159542 wrong = 159320电网ETF was replaced with similar-looking code 159542
Prevention: Use etf_map.json as the single source of truth. Never guess codes.

etf_knowledge.root_cause: 159542是机械ETF，159320才是电网ETF（特高压/变压器/硅钢/十五五）。注：159320不在1386只ETF官方列表中，可能是近期新发
159871不是电池ETF；易方达新能源ETF(516070)才是新能源+自动驾驶主题的正确代码

etf_knowledge.wrong_name: 银行ETF / 国债ETF / 证券ETF

etf_knowledge.root_cause: 512690=酒ETF（白酒/茅台/五粮液），不是能源ETF(石油/电力)，也不是金融ETF
用户核实：159322是黄金股ETF（真实存在，金矿股），不是未知代码
用户核实：电力ETF是561700，煤炭ETF是515220，切勿混淆
512800=银行ETF（工行/招行/六大行），金融综合=512800银行+512880证券+512070保险，不要混用
512880=证券ETF（券商/中信证券），新闻提到券商/证券/中信证券时必须用512900
